ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release group of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "worldwide_revenue" INTEGER /* Total worldwide revenue of the movie */,
  "domestic_revenue" INTEGER /* Total domestic revenue of the movie */,
  "foreign_revenue" INTEGER /* Total foreign revenue of the movie */,
  "domestic_percent" REAL /* Percentage of revenue generated domestically */,
  "foreign_percent" REAL /* Percentage of revenue generated internationally */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the data source */,
  "production_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the production of the movie */,
  "marketing_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for marketing the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_release_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_group_id") REFERENCES release_groups ("release_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_groups" (
  "release_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the release group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release group */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent company of the release group */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the release group was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of release */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the year is a leap year */,
  "total_movies_released" INTEGER /* Total number of movies released in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_types" (
  "revenue_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the revenue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revenue type */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the revenue type is primary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "revenue_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue type */,
  "revenue_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of revenue */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the revenue is reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_revenues_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_revenues_revenue_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("revenue_type_id") REFERENCES revenue_types ("revenue_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_files_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, executive, marketing) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the audience */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the audience */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the audience */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the audience in the demographic group */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the audience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_demographics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_spends" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing spend entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "spend_amount" INTEGER /* Amount spent on marketing */,
  "spend_channel" TEXT /* Channel of marketing (e.g., TV, Online, Print) */,
  "spend_date" TEXT /* Date of the marketing spend */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the marketing spend was made */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_spends_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the user (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user recommends the movie */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
